title: AimyTrade’s test portfolio just crossed +$500k since October
author: ExplanationNormal339
selftext:
https://preview.redd.it/4na49lih6k3g1.png?width=887&format=png&auto=webp&s=84c56d0da5f5a7cd2bb55526e01e52a87158baea

Sharing this because it surprised me too. The internal test portfolio on AimyTrade has been running quietly in the background since October, and it’s now up roughly half a million from where it started. No leverage, no wild bets, just systematic entries and tracking.

The line isn’t explosive, but it’s steady, and that’s what caught my attention. Most tools talk a lot, but it’s rare to actually see a portfolio move like this over a short window while staying consistent.

If you want to see how it’s being tracked, it’s all visible on [aimytrade.io](http://aimytrade.io).

comments.author: Sofullofsplendor_
comments.body: doesn't look steady.. looks like a couple of high risk bets paid off then nothing.

comments.author: ancientRAMEN
comments.body: You’re telling me you tripled the account with all of that happening  the last couple weeks of October and that it didn’t take any risky bets or is leveraged? Yeah I doubt this
